D

de.tsenger.androsmex.mrtd - package de.tsenger.androsmex.mrtd
Encapsulates MRTD (Machine Readable Travel Documents) data type that the DNIe v3.0 handles (name, surname, date of birth, picture, handwritten signature, etc.)
